instructions.text: Box the main idea, circle supporting details

paragraphs.text: Trees help the environment. They make oxygen. They provide shade. They are home to animals.
Exercise is good for health. It strengthens muscles. It improves mood. It helps you sleep better.
Reading builds vocabulary. You learn new words. You see words in context. You remember words better.

perfect.audio: You know main ideas and details

tryAgain.message: Main idea = big picture, Details = specifics
